issues.title: Deleted Adafruit LCD source still referenced by bsp_test project
evidence: That source file was removed from the repository working tree.
issues.repair: Replace the legacy display source entry with the current ili9341/fsmc_8080-based display layer or remove the legacy dependency from the test target.

issues.title: Deleted lcd_io_fsmc source still referenced by bsp_test project
evidence: That source file was removed from the repository working tree.
issues.repair: Replace the legacy bus glue source entry with the current FSMC 8080 implementation or remove the legacy dependency from the test target.

issues.title: BSP test entry still includes removed Adafruit LCD header
evidence: The legacy Adafruit header is no longer present in the repository.
issues.repair: Port Tests/BSP/main_bsp_test.c to the current display abstraction or reintroduce a compatible wrapper layer.

issues.title: No explicit scatter file configured in bsp_test target
evidence: inspect.txt lists only a scatter candidate at MDK-ARM/ai_tempconroler/ai_tempconroler.sct.
issues.repair: Confirm whether bsp_test should bind an explicit scatter file instead of relying on generated behavior.

issues.title: Scatter candidate memory does not fully match bsp_test target memory
evidence: Target memory includes two RAM regions while the discovered scatter candidate reports only one RAM region.
issues.repair: Review whether bsp_test should use its own scatter definition aligned with the target Cpu/device memory description.

issues.title: bsp_test target metadata was inconsistent with the dedicated BSP test target
evidence: The BSP test project previously carried stale target metadata and a mismatched uvoptx state from the main target.
The current uvprojx now exposes Target: bsp_test and Tests/BSP/main_bsp_test.c as the test entry source.
issues.repair: Repaired uvprojx target metadata and removed the stale uvoptx so Keil can regenerate a clean session file.
issues.validation: Current inspect.txt reports Target: bsp_test and Sources: 298 with Tests/BSP/main_bsp_test.c present in the Application/User/Core group.
